subject: Refund Request - Wrong Size
message: Hi, I ordered a Medium shirt but received a Large. I'd like a refund as the Medium is now out of stock. Order #12345.

subject: Technical Issue - Login Loop
message: I can't log into my account. Every time I enter my password, it just refreshes the page without an error message. Using Chrome on MacOS.

subject: Simple Question - Shipping Policy
message: Do you offer international shipping to France? If so, how much does it cost?

subject: SENSITIVE - FRAUD ALREADY REPORTED
message: URGENT: I see a charge of $500 on my credit card that I did not authorize. I have already contacted my bank. This is unacceptable and I demand an immediate investigation!

subject: Technical Bug - Checkout Button Grayed Out
message: I'm trying to buy the wireless headphones, but the 'Place Order' button is grayed out and I can't click it. I've filled in all my details.

subject: Simple Question - Product Availability
message: When will the blue ergonomic chair be back in stock? I've been waiting for weeks.

subject: Refund Request - Damaged Item
message: My order #67890 arrived today but the box was crushed and the product inside is broken. See attached photos.

subject: SENSITIVE - Legal Action Mentioned
message: I have been trying to get a response for my missing package for a month. If this is not resolved by Friday, I will be forced to take legal action and post about this on social media.

subject: Simple Question - Password Reset
message: How do I change my password? I can't find the settings page.

subject: COMPLEX - Multi-Product Issue and Custom Request
message: I received my bulk order of 50 units, but 10 are the wrong color, 5 are defective, and I need a custom invoice for tax purposes in my region. This is a very complicated mess.
